name: tapscore-app
description: Native iOS/Android shell for the TapScore PWA (via Capacitor).

scripts.run:ios: npm run sync && cap run ios
scripts.run:android: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.apk:build: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo "\nAPK: tools/tapscore-app/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk"
scripts.aab: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ./gradlew bundleRelease && echo "\nAAB (upload this to Play Console): tools/tapscore-app/android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab"
scripts.ios: npm run sync && cap run ios
